mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, points, avatar FROM user WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(username, password, nickname, role, points, status, create_time) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, '0', 100, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET points = points + #{amount} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM check_in_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND check_in_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_in_log (user_id, check_in_date) VALUES (#{userId}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, email, avatar, points) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{points})
